# default_table_options { #cdmconnector.default_table_options }

```python
default_table_options(user_options=None)
```

Default table formatting options (mirrors visOmopResults defaultTableOptions).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type         | Description                                                          | Default   |
|--------------|--------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| user_options | dict or None | Overrides for default options (decimals, decimal_mark, title, etc.). | `None`    |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                                       |
|--------|------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | dict\[str, Any\] | Options dict (decimals, decimal_mark, big_mark, na, title, etc.). |
